body:
Opus fresh-eyes review of FEAT-008 rewrite (commit c9c8859, reachable from merge 854b90f5).

HARD CHECK: grep -iE "react|vite|tanstack|minisearch" returns 0 against HEAD blob.
SOFT CHECK: Every page annotates its Houdini query name. Playwright explicitly named. MSW absent. **Vitest NOT named** — Test Plan > Unit Tests describes component/page/store testing but never names the runner.
QUALITY: Solid rewrite. Main gap: unit-test runner identity.
VERDICT: APPROVE_WITH_EDITS.
RECOMMENDATION: Do NOT reopen. The Vitest naming issue is epic-wide (ADR-002 deliberately omitted Vitest to satisfy its own grep gate); resolving it at the plan level, not here. File a tiny follow-up "name unit-test runner in FEAT-008" bead if strict criterion-3 compliance is needed.
source: opus batch review of 3 Stage 1 closes
summary: APPROVE_WITH_EDITS (non-blocking): 735-line rewrite passes hard grep gate; unit-test runner not named in Test Plan. Recommend not reopening; file tiny follow-up instead.
